description: Token consumer trusts claims without verifying the signature, or accepts alg:none / confused algorithms.
body: Failure mode: the service decodes a JWT and reads role/scope without verifying the signature, or accepts a token whose header says alg:none, or verifies an asymmetric token using the public key as an HMAC secret. Detection signals: decode without verify; alg taken from the token header; no iss/aud check. Do not trust any claim before signature verification. Safer fallback: pin the expected algorithm, verify with the correct key, check iss/aud/exp, and add tests for tampered-signature, alg:none, and wrong-issuer rejection.
